approved.original: श्रीवर्धमानो जयतु सर्वज्ञानशिरोमणि: पंचहस्तोत्तरो वीर: सिद्धार्थनुपदन:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Salutations to the great Varadhamana, the wise and courageous Pancha Hasta Uddhar.
approved.what_it_means: This esteemed individual possesses great wisdom and courage, guiding us on the path of knowledge.

approved.original: ज्ञानियो में शिरोमणि श्री वर्धमान सबसे उक्त्र है, उनकी जय हो
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Varadhamana is the greatest among the wise, may his glory be celebrated.
approved.what_it_means: Varadhamana's wisdom and knowledge inspire us to strive for greatness.

approved.original: वे सदा संसार के भले के लिए तत्पर रहते हैं, वे ही दीर्घ शरीर के स्वामी हैं, तथा सिद्धार्थ राजा के पुत्र है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: They always remain ready to benefit the world, they are the owners of long life, and are the sons of King Suddharth.
approved.what_it_means: Varadhamana's selfless nature and noble lineage make him a true leader and guardian of long life.

approved.original: निमित शास्त्रों के आठ भेद अडगविद्या निमित्तामष्टानामपि गीयते
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The eight branches of Nimit Shastra are well-known as Adag Vidya.
approved.what_it_means: The eight branches of Nimit Shastra hold the secrets of understanding human nature and destiny.

approved.original: मनुष्य के शुभाशुभ फल के ज्ञान हेतु नारद, पराशर, गर्ग आदि महर्षियों ने सामुद्रिकशास्त्र का निर्माण किया और आठ विद्याओं के बारे में विस्तार से विवेचन किया
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: To know the auspicious and inauspicious effects of humans, sages like Narada, Parashara, and Garga created Samudrika Shastra and extensively discussed the eight arts.
approved.what_it_means: Samudrika Shastra, created by great sages, reveals the secrets of human destiny and the eight arts of understanding the universe.

approved.term: Ang, Swapna, Svar, Bhumi, Vyanjan, Lakshan, Udyat, Anantariksh
approved.original: अंग, स्वपन, स्वर, भूमि, व्यंजन, लक्षण, उद्यात, तथा अन्तरिक्ष
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Ang, Swapna, Svar, Bhumi, Vyanjan, Lakshan, Udyat, and Anantariksh.
approved.what_it_means: These eight elements, representing the body, dreams, voice, earth, taste, characteristics, movement, and space, hold the secrets of human nature and the universe.

approved.original: यह कल्याण की चरम सीमा को धारण करने वाला है, अर्थात हाथ से ही इस संसार में धन-सम्पति तथा शोभा-श्री प्राप्त की जाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This mount is associated with the ultimate state of happiness, where one can attain wealth, prosperity, and beauty in this world. It signifies the ability to acquire material possessions and enjoy a luxurious life.
approved.what_it_means: This mount reveals the person's capacity for enjoying life's luxuries and their ability to accumulate wealth and material possessions.

approved.original: इस हाथ की पांचों अंगुलियां अधिष्ठात्री देवियां हैं जो साक्षात् इन्द्र की शक्तिया हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The five fingers of this hand are the presiding deities, who are the embodiment of Indra's powers. Each finger is associated with a specific deity and represents their divine energies.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's connection to the divine and their ability to tap into the powers of the universe.

approved.original: इसके द्वारा ही संसार के धर्म के पालन के लिए विवाह किया जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: It is through this hand that marriages are performed in accordance with the principles of the world's dharma. The hand is used to determine the suitability of a partner for marriage.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's compatibility with their partner and their ability to maintain a harmonious relationship.

approved.original: इसी से पूजा, यज्ञ, दान, भोजन, शान्ति तथा शन्तुनाश किया जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: It is through this hand that puja, yajna, dana, bhoga, shanti, and shantinash are performed. The hand is used to determine the suitability of a ritual or ceremony.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's connection to spiritual practices and their ability to perform rituals and ceremonies.

approved.original: इन सब क्रियाओं के लिए भी हाथ में अंगुलियों का होना परम आवश्यक है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Even for these activities, the presence of fingers on the hand is absolutely necessary. The fingers play a crucial role in determining the success of a ritual or ceremony.
approved.what_it_means: This feature highlights the importance of the fingers in palmistry and their role in determining the success of various activities.

approved.original: यही कारण है कि हाथ की अंगुलियों को महादेवी कहा गया है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is why the fingers of the hand are referred to as Mahadevi. The fingers are considered to be the embodiment of the divine feminine energy.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's connection to the divine feminine energy and their ability to tap into its power.

approved.original: इसीलिए हस्तशास्त्र के ग्रंथों में पंचांगुली महादेवी की उपासना का विधान है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Therefore, in the scriptures of Hastashastram, the worship of Panchanguli Mahadevi is prescribed. The fingers are worshipped as a symbol of the divine feminine energy.
approved.what_it_means: This feature highlights the importance of worshiping the fingers as a symbol of the divine feminine energy and its role in spiritual practices.

approved.original: सूर्धनी काल में मन, शरीर, आहार तीनों की शुद्धि आवश्यक है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the auspicious time, purification of mind, body, and food is necessary. This practice helps to purify the individual's being.
approved.what_it_means: This practice reveals the individual's spiritual readiness and their ability to receive higher knowledge.

approved.original: साधना सम्भी में प्रति दिन सूर्यादय के समय पंचाङ्गुली मंत्र का 108 बार रुद्धाक्ष मूलि पर जप करने के पश्चात पंचमेवायुक्त अनेक द्रव्य डालकर हवन सामग्री द्वारा 10 आहुतियां दे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the auspicious time, recite the Panchanguli mantra 108 times on the Rudraksha rosary, followed by offering 10 oblations with Panchamrita and various substances.
approved.what_it_means: This practice reveals the individual's spiritual readiness and their ability to receive higher knowledge.

approved.original: ऐसा एक महीना पर्यन्त करते रहें, इस तरह एक महीने में यह मंत्र सिद्ध हो जाएगा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Practice this for a month, and the mantra will become siddha.
approved.what_it_means: This practice reveals the individual's spiritual readiness and their ability to receive higher knowledge.

approved.original: मंत्र सिद्ध होने के बाद प्रात:काल उठकर 7 बार इस मंत्र को पढ़कर अपने हाथों पर फुक मारे और हाथों को अपने शरीर पर किरा लें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: After the mantra becomes siddha, wake up early and read the mantra 7 times, then slap your hands and apply the energy to your body.
approved.what_it_means: This practice reveals the individual's ability to harness and apply spiritual energy.

approved.original: इस क्रिया को करने के बाद हस्तरेखा का अध्ययन करने पर निश्चय ही भविष्यवाणी सत्य होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: After performing this practice, the study of hand lines will definitely reveal true predictions.
approved.what_it_means: This practice reveals the individual's ability to accurately read and interpret hand lines.

approved.original: पंचागुली साधना विधान पंचागुली देवी के बारे में अनेक प्राचीन ग्रन्थों में उल्लेख मिलता है और उसमें यह स्पष्ट किया गया है कि यदि कोई व्यक्ति नियम पूर्वक पंचागुली देवी की साधना करे तो शीघ्र ही वह सफल भविष्यवक्ता बन सकता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Panchanguli Sadhana is mentioned in many ancient texts about Panchanguli Devi, and it is clearly stated that if a person regularly practices Panchanguli Sadhana, they can become a successful predictor soon.
approved.what_it_means: This practice reveals the individual's potential to become a skilled and accurate predictor.

approved.original: किसी भी व्यक्ति का हाथ देखते ही उस व्यक्ति का भूत, वर्तमान और भविष्य उसके सामने साकार हो जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: When you look at someone's hand, their past, present, and future become manifest before you.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals the individual's entire life story, including their past, present, and future, through the lines on their hand.

approved.original: साथ ही वह अनेक सूक्ष्म रहस्यों से भी भली भाँति परिचित हो जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Along with this, he becomes well-acquainted with many subtle secrets.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals the individual's ability to understand and interpret subtle and complex aspects of human nature and destiny.

approved.original: पंचागुली साधना में शुभ मुहूर्त का विवेचन इस प्रकार है मास यह साधना किसी भी महीने से प्रारंभ की जा सकती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In Panchanguli Sadhana, the auspicious time for starting the practice is discussed. It can be initiated in any month.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's flexibility and adaptability in their spiritual practices.

approved.original: पर बैसाख, कर्तिक, आश्विन तथा माघ मास विशेष शुभ माने गए हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Besides Baisakh, Kartik, Ashwin, and Magh months are considered especially auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: These months indicate a person's strong connection with spiritual and cultural traditions.

approved.term: Dwitiya, Panchami, Saptami, Ashtami, Dashami, Purnima
approved.original: तिथि यह साधना शुक्ल पक्ष की द्वितीया, पंचमी, सप्तमी, अष्टमी, दशमी, अथवा पूर्णमासी से प्रारम्भ की जा सकती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This practice can be initiated on Dwitiya, Panchami, Saptami, Ashtami, Dashami, or Purnima days of the Shukla Paksha.
approved.what_it_means: These lunar days signify a person's ability to navigate life's challenges and make progress.

approved.original: वार रवि, बुध, गुरु तथा शुक्रवार इसे प्रारंभ करने के लिये श्रेष्ठ माने गए हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Ravi, Budh, Guru, and Shukravar are considered the best days to start this practice.
approved.what_it_means: These planetary influences indicate a person's strong connection with spiritual growth and self-awareness.

approved.term: Kritika, Rohini, Punarvasu, Hasta, Uttara, Anuradha, Shrawan
approved.original: नक्षत्र कृतिका, रोहिणी, पुनर्वसु, हस्त, तीनों उत्तरा, अनुराधा तथा श्रवण नक्षत्र विशेष अनुकूल माने जाते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Kritika, Rohini, Punarvasu, Hasta, Uttara, Anuradha, and Shrawan nakshatras are considered especially auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: These lunar mansions signify a person's positive relationships and harmonious connections with others.

approved.original: स्थल सामुद्रिक शास्त्र लग्न स्थिर लग्न, वृष, सिंह, वृषिक कुंभ लग्न प्रशस्त मानी गयी है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In Samudrika Shastra, Sthir Laghna, Vrish, Singh, Vrishik, and Kumbh Laghna are considered auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: These planetary influences indicate a person's stability, confidence, and strong willpower.

approved.term: Tirtha Bhumi, Ganga Yamuna Sangam, Riverbank, Mountain, Cave, Temple
approved.original: स्थान तीर्थभूमि, गंगा यमुना संगम, नदी का तट, पर्वत, गुफाएं तथा मन्दिर इसके लिये शुभ है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Tirtha Bhumi, Ganga Yamuna Sangam, riverbank, mountain, cave, and temple are considered auspicious locations.
approved.what_it_means: These sacred locations indicate a person's connection with the divine and their spiritual growth.

approved.original: यदि ये स्थान सुलभ न हो तो घर के एकान्त कमरे का उपयोग किया जा सकता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If these locations are not available, a quiet room in the house can be used.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's ability to adapt and find inner peace in any situation.

approved.original: पूजन सामग्री कुंकुम, नरियल (जटा वाले) दीपक अवीर चावल दही गुलाल बादाम शक्कर मौली अखरोट पान सुपारियां काजू भोज-पत्र केशर किस्मिसे पीपल के पत्ते बताशा चिश्री कच्चा दूध दुग्ध प्रसाद अग्रवती घृत कपूर लौंग पुष्प इलायची काली मिर्च पुष्पमाला, हवन सामग्री यजोपवीत शहद गंगा जल फल इतर कुएं का शुद्ध जल
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A collection of items for worship, including vermilion, coconut, lamp, uncooked rice, yogurt, gulal, almonds, sugar, moli, akhrot, betel leaf, kesar, pippal leaves, etc. This is a list of offerings for a Hindu ritual.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals the importance of spiritual offerings and rituals in one's life, indicating a strong connection to their faith and tradition.

approved.original: इस साधना में कुछ बातें अत्यन्त आवश्यक हैं, जो निम्नलिखित हैं- 1. स्त्री संसर्ग तथा स्त्री चर्चा साधना काल में त्याज्य है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Some things are extremely necessary in this practice, which are as follows - 1. Female association and female conversation are to be avoided during the practice period.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates the importance of self-discipline and focus during spiritual practices, suggesting that one may struggle with distractions or temptations.

approved.original: 4. नग्नावस्था में, विना स्नान के, अपवित्र हाथ से, सिर पर कपड़ा रख कर जप करना निषिद्ध है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: 4. In a state of nudity, without bathing, with impure hands, keeping a cloth on the head and reciting prayers is prohibited.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests that one may struggle with feelings of shame or guilt, or may have a tendency to hide their true nature.

approved.original: 5. जप के समय माला पूरी हुए विना, बातचीत नहीं करनी चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: 5. Without completing the rosary, one should not engage in conversation.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a need for focus and concentration during spiritual practices, suggesting that one may be easily distracted.

approved.original: 6. छींक अप्रश्य, अपान वायु होने पर हाथ धोयें तथा कानों कुरंजल से स्पर्श करें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: 6. When one sneezes or has an outflow of air, one should wash their hands and touch the ears with a conch shell.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests that one may be sensitive to changes in their environment or may have a tendency to react impulsively.

approved.original: 7. आलस्य, जम्हाई, छींक, नींद, थूकना, उरना, अपवित्र वस्त्र, बातचीत, क्रोध आदि जपकाल में वर्जित है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: 7. Lethargy, dozing, sneezing, sleep, spitting, belching, impure clothes, conversation, anger, etc. are prohibited during the practice period.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a need for self-control and discipline, suggesting that one may struggle with impulsivity or emotional regulation.

approved.original: 8. पहले दिन जितना जप किया जाए रोज उतना ही जप करें इसे घटाना उचित नहीं है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: 8. As much as one recites prayers on the first day, one should recite the same amount every day. Reducing it is not proper.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests that one values consistency and routine, indicating a strong sense of responsibility and commitment.

approved.original: 9. जपकाल में शौच जाने पर मुनि-स्नान कर जप में बैठे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: 9. When going for a bath during the practice period, one should take a munisnana bath and sit for prayer.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a need for purification and cleansing, suggesting that one may be carrying emotional or spiritual baggage.

approved.original: जपकाल के नियम जपकाल में निन निधर्मों का भी पालन किया जाना चाहिए- 1. भूमि शयन, 2. ब्रह्मवर्च, 3. नित्य स्नान, 4. मौन, 5. नित्य दान, 6. गुरु सेवा 7. पापकर्म परित्याग 8. नित्य पूजा 9. देवतार्चन 10. इष्टदेव व गुरु में श्रद्धा, 11. सूप निष्ठा 12. पवित्रता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Nine virtues to be followed during Japakal. These include living on the earth, following Brahmacharya, daily bathing, maintaining silence, regular donation, serving the guru, abandoning sinful deeds, daily worship, worshipping deities, and having faith in the guru and deity.
approved.what_it_means: By following these virtues, one can purify their mind and soul, leading to spiritual growth and a deeper connection with the divine.

approved.original: नारित हस्तात्परं ज्ञानं त्रैलोक्ये सघराघरे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The knowledge of the hand is supreme in all three worlds.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Jupiter is a symbol of wisdom, knowledge, and spiritual growth. Its presence indicates a strong desire for knowledge and understanding.

approved.original: यदबद्धायं शास्त्रकं हस्ते धृतबोधाय जभिनाम
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This sacred scripture is held in the hand for the benefit of all beings.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Mercury is associated with communication, intellect, and adaptability. Its presence suggests a quick and agile mind, capable of learning and adapting to new situations.

approved.original: तीनों लोकों में हस्तज्ञान सबसे बढकर ज्ञान माना गया है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Hand knowledge is considered the most superior knowledge in all three worlds.
approved.what_it_means: Hand knowledge is a powerful tool for understanding human nature and predicting future events. It requires great skill and expertise to interpret accurately.

approved.original: वास्तव में यह ब्रह्माजी द्वारा लिखा गया एक ऐसा ग्रन्थ है जो जीवन भर मनुष्य का मार्गदर्शन कराता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This is a sacred scripture written by Brahma that guides humans throughout their lives.
approved.what_it_means: Palmistry is an ancient science that provides insights into a person's character, destiny, and potential. It requires a deep understanding of the human psyche and the universe.

approved.original: सामुद्रिक शास्त्र में ग्रहों का कारकत्व हाथ का अध्ययन करते समय ग्रहों के स्थान को भली प्रकार निरीक्षण कर अनेक बातों का भविष्य बताया जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In Samudrika Shastra, the influence of planets is considered while studying the hand, and by observing the position of planets, one can predict many things.
approved.what_it_means: The planetary influence on the hand reveals a person's strengths, weaknesses, and potential. It helps in understanding their personality, relationships, and life events.

approved.original: यदि कोई ग्रह नीच है या किसी ग्रह के क्षेत्र में दूधित रेखाएं अथवा अशुभ चिन्ह हो तो उस ग्रह से सम्बन्धित विषय को बताना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If a planet is debilitated or if there are broken or inauspicious lines in a planet's area, then one should indicate the related subject.
approved.what_it_means: Planetary deformities indicate challenges, obstacles, and potential pitfalls in a person's life. They require careful analysis and interpretation to understand their impact.

approved.original: सूर्य- आत्मा, स्वभाव, स्वास्थ्य, राज्य, रोग, सिरदर्द, अपच, तीक्ष्ण, बुखार, दस्त, पेचिस, नेत्ररोग, पिता, अपमान व कलह आदि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Sun - ego, nature, health, kingdom, disease, headache, indigestion, sharpness, fever, diarrhea, constipation, eye disease, father, insult, and conflict, etc.
approved.what_it_means: The Sun Line reveals a person's ego, nature, and health. It indicates their potential for leadership, creativity, and success, as well as potential challenges and conflicts.

approved.original: चन्द्र- बात, कफ, राजयुक्ता, शारीरिकबल, मनोवृत्ति, सुम्भिति, पीलिया, जुकाम, दमा, बुखार, खाँसी, मूत्ररोग, गुुदरोग, भ्रमण, पेट व मस्तिष्क आदि
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Associated with emotions, water, physical strength, and mental attitude. This line reveals the person's emotional and physical well-being.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Chandra Line indicates emotional balance and physical strength, while a broken or weak line suggests emotional turmoil and health issues.

approved.page: [page 24] शरल सामुद्रिक शास्त्र 10. शनि रेखा लम्बी सीधी और अंखंड होने से जातक निश्चय भावना वाला, बौद्धिक विचार वाला, समझदार, दूरदर्शी और गम्भीर होता है
approved.original: शनि रेखा लम्बी सीधी और अंखंड होने से जातक निश्चय भावना वाला, बौद्धिक विचार वाला, समझदार, दूरदर्शी और गम्भीर होता है
approved.simple_explanation: This indicates a person with a clear and determined mind, intellectual thoughts, and a wise and far-sighted nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for clarity, determination, and wisdom.

approved.page: [page 24] 11. शनि रेखा कई बार खण्डित हो, गुरु रेखा लम्बी तथा सीधी हो, मंगल रेखा बीच में कटी हो, सूर्य रेखा धनुषाकार हो, शुक्र रेखा बीच से कटी हो तो वह जातके सत्य भावी सरल, विनम्र सबका प्रिय, नेता, आदि होता है
approved.term: Shani Line, Guru Line, Mangal Line, Surya Line, Shukra Line
approved.original: शनि रेखा कई बार खण्डित हो, गुरु रेखा लम्बी तथा सीधी हो, मंगल रेखा बीच में कटी हो, सूर्य रेखा धनुषाकार हो, शुक्र रेखा बीच से कटी हो तो वह जातके सत्य भावी सरल, विनम्र सबका प्रिय, नेता, आदि होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This indicates a person who is truthful, simple, humble, loved by all, a leader, and so on.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for being honest, humble, and a natural leader.

approved.page: [page 24] 12. शनि और गुरु रेखा पर अर्धं बन्द्राकार का निशान हो तथा सूर्य या चंद्र रेखा परस्पर मिली होती वह परम सौभाग्यश्रोती माना जाता है
approved.term: Shani Line, Guru Line, Surya Line, Chandra Line
approved.original: शनि और गुरु रेखा पर अर्धं बन्द्राकार का निशान हो तथा सूर्य या चंद्र रेखा परस्पर मिली होती वह परम सौभाग्यश्रोती माना जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This indicates a person who is extremely fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's immense good fortune and prosperity.

approved.page: [page 24] 13. शनि रेखा बीच में कटी हो तथा टेडी हो, गुरु रेखा बीच से टेडी हो तथा दांये भाग में कटी हो, मंगल तथा सूर्य रेखा दांयी ओर स्पांकार हो
approved.term: Shani Line, Guru Line, Mangal Line, Surya Line
approved.original: शनि रेखा बीच में कटी हो तथा टेडी हो, गुरु रेखा बीच से टेडी हो तथा दांये भाग में कटी हो, मंगल तथा सूर्य रेखा दांयी ओर स्पांकार हो
approved.simple_explanation: This indicates a person with a mixed and sometimes troubled nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency to be unpredictable and face occasional difficulties.

approved.original: शनि रेखा छोटी हो, गुरु रेखा बीच में खण्डित हो, मंगल रेखा लम्बी और टेडी हो साथ ही एक ओर अधिक झुकी हो, शुक्र रेखा बीच से खण्डित हो साथ ही दायी ओर एक रेखा उसे कटी हो, तो ऐसा जातक अभिमानी, क्रोधी, मित्रों द्वारा तिरस्कृत, व्यभिचारी, कामातुर आदि अवगुणों वाला होता है
approved.simple_explanation: A short Shani Rekha with a broken Guru Rekha and a long, crooked Mangal Rekha indicates a person with pride, anger, and a tendency to be rejected by friends, engage in adultery, and be overly sensual.
approved.what_it_means: This person will struggle with self-control, anger, and relationships, and may be prone to infidelity.

approved.original: शनि रेखा गहरी तथा टेढी हो, गुरु रेखा लम्बी हो तथा दोनों ओर झुकी हो, सूर्य रेखा बीच में खण्डित हो, ता जातक सुन्दर, सुखी, उदार, विद्वान, यशस्वी, धर्मात्मा तथा भाई बन्धुओं का सम्मानीय होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A deep and crooked Shani Rekha with a long and bent Guru Rekha and a broken Surya Rekha indicates a person who is beautiful, happy, generous, wise, successful, religious, and respectful of his brothers.
approved.what_it_means: This person will be blessed with beauty, happiness, and success, and will be well-respected by his family and community.

approved.original: शनि और गुरु रेखा ऊपर की ओर चन्द्राकार हो, शनि रेखा छोटी हो, दोनों भौह परस्पर मिली हो ऐसा जातक, धनी, असत्य भाषी, कामातुर और व्यभिचारी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: A Shani and Guru Rekha that curves upwards like a crescent moon, a short Shani Rekha, and merged eyebrows indicate a person who is wealthy, speaks falsely, is overly sensual, and engages in adultery.
approved.what_it_means: This person will be wealthy but may struggle with honesty and relationships.

approved.original: शनि रेखा धनुषाकार हो, गुरु रेखा सर्पाकार हो, मंगल रेखा लम्बी हो, सूर्य रेखा शाखा गुक हो, शुक्र रेखा बीच में कटी हो, वह जातक, गुरुकुली, लोमी, अशान्त तथा असफल जीवन वाला होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A Shani Rekha that curves like a bow, a Guru Rekha that curves like a snake, a long Mangal Rekha, a Surya Rekha that branches out, and a broken Shukra Rekha indicate a person who is a student, has a bad temper, is restless, and has an unsuccessful life.
approved.what_it_means: This person will struggle with education, temper, and success.

approved.original: शनि रेखा लम्बी हो, गुरु रेखा सर्पाकार हो, वह जातक अपनी पल्नी से भय और कष्ट पाता है
approved.simple_explanation: A long Shani Rekha and a snake-like Guru Rekha indicate a person who fears and suffers from their family.
approved.what_it_means: This person will struggle with fear and suffering from their family.

approved.original: शनि रेखा सीधी हो तथा बीच में दो रेखाओं द्वारा काटी जाय, मंगल व गुरु रेखा बीच में खण्डित हो, ऐसे जातक की सम्पति को खतरा होता है
approved.simple_explanation: A straight Shani Rekha that is cut in the middle by two lines, and a broken Mangal and Guru Rekha, indicate a person whose wealth is at risk.
approved.what_it_means: This person's wealth is at risk of being lost or compromised.

approved.original: दार्यी आंख के ऊपर शनि रेखा पर V का निशान होने से आर्थिक नुकसानों का सामना होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A V-shaped mark on the Shani Rekha above the Darri Aankh indicates facing financial losses.
approved.what_it_means: This person will struggle with financial losses.

approved.original: शनि रेखा पर ऊपर की ओर तथा शुक्र रेखा से नीचे की ओर जाती हुई दो-दो रेखायें होने से कर्ज लेना पड़ता है
approved.simple_explanation: Two lines on the Shani Rekha that move upwards and the Shukra Rekha that moves downwards indicate a person who has to take loans.
approved.what_it_means: This person will struggle with debt and may need to take loans.

approved.original: खण्डित मंगल रेखा से व्यक्ति इगडालू, एवं क्रोधी स्वभाव का होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a broken Mars Line is hot-headed and prone to anger.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency to be short-tempered and impulsive.

approved.original: मंगल रेखा सर्पाकार हो साथ ही शनि रेखा सर्पाकार हो एवं दोनों के मध्य में बज का निशान हो, ऐसे जातक का मरितक प्रभावित होता है तथा वह निराश होकर आत्म हत्या को आतुर होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line is wavy and the Saturn Line is also wavy, with a dot in between, such a person's life is affected by death and they become eager to commit suicide.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's vulnerability to suicidal tendencies due to their life circumstances.

approved.original: मंगल रेखा टेडी हो, खण्डित हो, दोषपूर्ण हो, तो वह जातक अधिकांश, कार्यो में असफल रहता है एवं उसके कार्यो में बाधा उत्पन्न होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line is crooked, broken, and defective, the person is mostly unsuccessful in their endeavors and faces obstacles.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's tendency to face challenges and obstacles in their work and life.

approved.original: सीधी व स्पष्ट मंगल रेखा होने से जातक सभी कार्यो में सफल होता है क्योंकि उसमें साहस की अधिकता होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A straight and clear Mars Line makes the person successful in all endeavors because of their abundance of courage.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's courage and confidence in achieving success.

approved.term: Mars Line, Saturn Line, Jupiter Line
approved.original: मंगल एवं शनि रेखा बीच में दूधी हो, गुरु रेखा दोनों के बीच में झुकी हो तो ऐसा जातक धनी, दुरदर्शी एवं संभाग्यशाली होता है यदि शनि और गुरु रेखा खण्डित होकर आपस में मिलेंगी तो अशुभ है ऐसी स्थिति में जातक स्वयं अपना जीवन बरबाद करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars and Saturn Lines are connected with a dot in between, and the Jupiter Line is bent in between them, such a person is wealthy, wise, and fortunate. However, if the Saturn and Jupiter Lines are broken and intersect, it is inauspicious, and the person ruins their own life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's potential for wealth, wisdom, and good fortune, but also their risk of self-destruction if they make poor choices.

approved.original: यदि मंगल रेखा चन्द्र रेखा की ओर झुकी हो और उस पर मस्ता हो, शनि रेखा लम्बी एवं गहरी हो गुरु रेखा छोटी हो ऐसे जातक कठोर एवं हिसक हृदय के स्वामी होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line is bent towards the Moon Line and has a dot on it, the Saturn Line is long and deep, and the Jupiter Line is short, such a person is hard-hearted and a master of harsh hearts.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's tendency to be tough and unyielding, with a heart that is resistant to emotional connections.

approved.term: Mars Line, Jupiter Line, Saturn Line
approved.original: मंगल रेखा छोटी हो गुरु रेखा टेडी हो शनि रेखा सीधी हो तो जातक भाग्यशाली होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line is short, the Jupiter Line is crooked, and the Saturn Line is straight, the person is fortunate.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals a person's good fortune and auspicious circumstances.

approved.original: मंगल रेखा बीच में टूटी हो सूर्य रेखा लम्बी हो तो जातक धनी होता दयालु एवं बुद्धिमान होता है ऐसे जातक अनेक लोगों को सुख प्रदान करने वाले होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mars Line is broken in the middle and the Sun Line is long, the person is wealthy, compassionate, and wise, and such a person is a source of happiness for many.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for wealth, compassion, and wisdom, making them a source of happiness for others.

approved.page: [page 32] ललाट पर पायी जाने वाली सूर्य रेखा से जातक में – धन, सम्पति, ऐश्वर्य, सम्मान, प्रलोभन, खर्चीला स्वभाव, बौद्धिक क्षमता आदि के बारे में जाना जाता है
approved.original: ललाट पर पायी जाने वाली सूर्य रेखा से जातक में – धन, सम्पति, ऐश्वर्य, सम्मान, प्रलोभन, खर्चीला स्वभाव, बौद्धिक क्षमता आदि के बारे में जाना जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Surya Rakh line reveals information about a person's wealth, status, and intellectual abilities. It also indicates their spending habits and potential for success.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Surya Rakh line indicates a person's potential for wealth, status, and intellectual abilities, but may also suggest a tendency to be overly materialistic.

approved.page: [page 32] सूर्य रेखा लम्बी एवं निर्देश होना शुभ माना जाता है
approved.original: सूर्य रेखा लम्बी एवं निर्देश होना शुभ माना जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A long and straight Surya Rakh line is considered auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: A long and straight Surya Rakh line suggests a person's potential for success and stability in their career and financial life.

approved.page: [page 32] चेहरा विज्ञान में सूर्य रेखा देखकर जातक के जीवन में धन, सम्पति, ऐश्वर्य, सम्मान, प्रलोभन, कार्य, खर्चीला, स्वभाव, बौद्धिक क्षमता आदि के बारे में जाना जा सकता है ये रेखा दाहिनी आंख के ऊपर पायी जाती है
approved.original: चेहरा विज्ञान में सूर्य रेखा देखकर जातक के जीवन में धन, सम्पति, ऐश्वर्य, सम्मान, प्रलोभन, कार्य, खर्चीला, स्वभाव, बौद्धिक क्षमता आदि के बारे में जाना जा सकता है ये रेखा दाहिनी आंख के ऊपर पायी जाती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Surya Rakh line, located above the right eye, reveals information about a person's life, including their wealth, status, and intellectual abilities.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Surya Rakh line indicates a person's potential for success and stability in their career and financial life.

approved.page: [page 32] कभी-कभी इस रेखा की लम्बाई अधिक होने से चन्द्र रेखा में मिल जाती है तथा अधिक छोटी होने पर चन्द्र रेखा से दूर रहती है
approved.original: कभी-कभी इस रेखा की लम्बाई अधिक होने से चन्द्र रेखा में मिल जाती है तथा अधिक छोटी होने पर चन्द्र रेखा से दूर रहती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Sometimes, a long Surya Rakh line merges with the Moon line, while a short line remains separate from it.
approved.what_it_means: A long Surya Rakh line merging with the Moon line may indicate a person's emotional and intuitive nature, while a short line suggests a more rational and independent approach to life.

approved.page: [page 32] जिस जातक के ललाट पर सूर्य रेखा स्प्रेष्ट एवं पूर्ण हो तो ऐसे जातक धन सम्पति से सम्पन्न होते हैं तथा इनकी बुद्धिक क्षमता अच्छी होती है, यदि सूर्य रेखा दोनी हो, खण्डित हो तो जातक में लोभ की साधना बढ़ जाती है वह अधिक लालची और स्वार्थी बन जाता है इस रेखा के अभाव में व्यक्ति ऐश्वर्य और सम्मान से वंचित रह जाता है
approved.original: जिस जातक के ललाट पर सूर्य रेखा स्प्रेष्ट एवं पूर्ण हो तो ऐसे जातक धन सम्पति से सम्पन्न होते हैं तथा इनकी बुद्धिक क्षमता अच्छी होती है, यदि सूर्य रेखा दोनी हो, खण्डित हो तो जातक में लोभ की साधना बढ़ जाती है वह अधिक लालची और स्वार्थी बन जाता है इस रेखा के अभाव में व्यक्ति ऐश्वर्य और सम्मान से वंचित रह जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Surya Rakh line is clear and complete, the person is likely to be wealthy and have good intellectual abilities. However, if the line is broken or incomplete, the person may become greedy and self-centered.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Surya Rakh line indicates a person's potential for wealth and intellectual abilities, but a broken or incomplete line may suggest a tendency towards greed and self-centeredness.

approved.page: [page 32] ललाट पर सूर्य रेखा कुछ गोलायी में हो तो जातक स्पष्ट बोलने वाला तथा कार्यों को सोच विचार कर करने वाला होता है और कार्यों में सफलता भी प्राप्त करता है
approved.original: ललाट पर सूर्य रेखा कुछ गोलायी में हो तो जातक स्पष्ट बोलने वाला तथा कार्यों को सोच विचार कर करने वाला होता है और कार्यों में सफलता भी प्राप्त करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Surya Rakh line is slightly curved, the person is likely to be clear in their speech and thought, and successful in their work.
approved.what_it_means: A slightly curved Surya Rakh line suggests a person's ability to communicate effectively and make thoughtful decisions, leading to success in their work.

approved.page: [page 33] **Text 3:** 4. जिस जातक के ललाट पर शनि क्षेत्र में अर्ध चन्द्राकार कई रेखायें होंगी, साथ ही गुरु एवं मंगल रेखा लम्बी एवं सर्पाकार होनी
approved.original: जिस जातक के ललाट पर शनि क्षेत्र में अर्ध चन्द्राकार कई रेखायें होंगी, साथ ही गुरु एवं मंगल रेखा लम्बी एवं सर्पाकार होनी
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the person has multiple curved lines in the Shani Kshetra area, along with long and wavy Guru and Mangal lines.
approved.what_it_means: This combination suggests a person's tendency towards anxiety, fear, and restlessness, as well as a potential for emotional turmoil and instability.

approved.page: [page 33] ऐसे जातक दुखी, भयगीत, चितित एवं चंचल इंद्रियों के स्वामी होते हैं
approved.original: ऐसे जातक दुखी, भयगीत, चितित एवं चंचल इंद्रियों के स्वामी होते हैं
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Such individuals are sad, fearful, anxious, and have restless senses.
approved.what_it_means: A person with these characteristics may struggle with emotional turmoil, anxiety, and restlessness, which can affect their relationships and overall well-being.

approved.what_it_means: A person with no hair on the mount of the Moon may be effeminate and lacking in masculinity, potentially struggling with self-confidence.

approved.original: थोड़े बाल और कहीं पर बाल होना मतलवी और दूरदर्शिता का सूचक बताया है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A little hair and some hair elsewhere is a sign of nausea and foresight. This suggests a person with a sensitive and intuitive nature.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a mix of hair and no hair may be sensitive and intuitive, with a strong connection to their emotions and a sense of foresight.

approved.original: पद्यं मालाडकुशं छत्रं नन्दावर्तं: प्रदक्षण:
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A mark resembling a moon, a lotus, a canopy, or a swastika on the hand indicates a person's emotional nature.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's emotional depth, sensitivity, and intuition.

approved.original: पणिपादे भवेद्यस्या: राजो भोग्यात्र सा सुता
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A person with a well-developed Mount of Jupiter on their foot is destined to be a ruler or enjoy royal treatment.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the person's natural leadership abilities and potential for success.

approved.original: जिसके हाथ में घोर, छत्र का निशान बनता हो तो ऐसी स्त्री रानी होकर पुत्रवती होती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a Ghatak Line on her hand becomes a queen and a mother figure.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's nurturing qualities, maternal instincts, and potential for leadership.

approved.term: Mount of Jupiter, Mount of Moon, etc.
approved.original: जिसके हाथ या पैर में कमल, माला, अंकुश, छत्र, स्वस्तिक, दक्षिणावर्त शंख हो, वह नारी राजा की भोग्या पत्नी होती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a lotus, garland, hook, canopy, swastika, or conch shell on her hand or foot is a suitable wife for a king.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the person's potential to be a queen or a partner to a powerful individual.

approved.original: जिसकी अंगुलियां आपस में भिली हुई, कमल की पंखुड़ियों के समान कोमल तथा लाल हो, हथेली कोमल हो, वह स्त्री सदा सुख प्राप्त करती है तथा दिनोदिन उन्नति करती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with soft, pink, and delicate fingers and a soft palm always experiences happiness and progresses in life.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's gentle nature, emotional intelligence, and potential for success.

approved.original: नोट- क. जिसे स्त्री के पैर की कनिका अंगुली से लेकर आगे तक जितनी अंगुलियां चलते समय जमीन से उठी रहें, वह उतने ही पति के दुर्भाग्य का कारण बनती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The number of fingers a woman's little finger touches while walking indicates the number of misfortunes her husband will face.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's potential to cause trouble or misfortune in their partner's life.

approved.original: ख. यदि पैर में एक अंगुली कम हो तो वह झगड़ालू होती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a short index finger on her foot is quarrelsome.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates the person's argumentative nature and potential for conflict.

approved.original: ग. यदि पैर का अंगूठा छोटा, गोल, टेढ़ा, चपटा हो तथा लाल रहता हो तो स्त्री अशुभ फलों की मूर्ति होती ह
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman with a short, stubby, and red thumb on her foot is a symbol of inauspicious results.
approved.what_it_means: This feature reveals the person's potential for bad luck, misfortune, or negative outcomes.

approved.original: जिसकी अंगुलियां लाल कमल की तरह कोमल हों, वह सदा सुख भोगती है
approved.simple_explanation: This suggests a person with soft and delicate features, often associated with a happy and contented life.
approved.what_it_means: A person with soft and delicate features is likely to be happy and contented, with a strong connection to emotions and relationships.

approved.original: खसुरी गोत्रेखायां स्त्रीणां दक्षिणहस्ततः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women with broken or fragmented heart lines on their right hand.
approved.what_it_means: A broken or fragmented heart line on the right hand may indicate emotional turmoil or relationship issues for a woman.

approved.original: स्त्रियों के दायें हाथ में आयुरेखा से पति का विचार करना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women should consider their husband's life line on their right hand.
approved.what_it_means: A woman's husband's life line on her right hand can reveal information about his life, health, and destiny.

approved.original: स्त्री के दायें हाथ की पिनूरेखा से ससुर का विचार करना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: A woman should consider her father-in-law's head line on her right hand.
approved.what_it_means: A woman's father-in-law's head line on her right hand can reveal information about his personality, character, and life journey.

approved.original: स्त्रियों के बायें हाथ में धर्मरेखा (सूर्य पर्वत की रेखा) से धम्म का विचार किया जाता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women consider the Sun line (Dharma line) on their left hand to understand their spiritual path.
approved.what_it_means: The Sun line on a woman's left hand can reveal information about her spiritual path, life purpose, and connection to her higher self.

approved.original: यदि दायें हाथ में माला या रस्सी का चिन्ह होतो स्त्री के पास पशुधन खूब होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is a mala or rope sign on the right hand, a woman has a lot of livestock.
approved.what_it_means: A mala or rope sign on a woman's right hand can indicate a strong connection to her material wealth, particularly livestock or animals.

approved.original: स्त्रियों के बायें मणिबन्ध से दास-दासियों, नौकरों तथा सेवारियों का विचार करना चाहिए
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Women should consider the Mount of Venus on their left hand to understand their relationships with servants, employees, and servants.
approved.what_it_means: The Mount of Venus on a woman's left hand can reveal information about her relationships with those who serve her, including employees and servants.

approved.original: अभ्यास प्रश्नावली 1. सखा (कठोर) हाथों की क्या विशेषता होती है ? 2. स्त्रियों के हाथ के लक्षण के बारे में विवरण प्रस्तुत करें ? 3. भाग्यशाली के हाथ के बारे में लिखें ? 4. अंग विद्या में हस्तलक्षण का महत्व लिखें
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Practice questions 1. What are the characteristics of a hard (coarse) hand? 2. Describe the characteristics of a woman's hand. 3. Write about the lucky person's hand. 4. Write about the importance of hand characteristics in Ang Vidyaa.
approved.what_it_means: A hard or coarse hand may indicate a person with a strong will, determination, and possibly a more challenging life journey.

approved.original: अध्याय-५ सरल सामुद्रिक शास्त्र 5. The Effect of First Finger तर्जनी अंगुली का मानव जीवन पर अत्यधिक प्रभाव पड़ता है, यह अंगुली बाह्य संसार (बाहरी दुनिया) के साथ सम्बन्ध बनाये रखती है, जिसे हम सम्बोधन किया कहते है
approved.simple_explanation: The thumb has a significant impact on human life, influencing relationships with the external world. It's associated with communication and expression.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed thumb indicates effective communication and adaptability in social situations. A weak thumb may suggest difficulties in expressing oneself or forming meaningful connections.

approved.original: तर्जनी अंगुली अन्दर की ओर झुक जाए तो यह सुमधना चाहिए कि उस जातक का, बाहरी दुनिया से लगाव कम है
approved.simple_explanation: If the thumb is inclined inward, it may indicate a reduced attachment to the external world.
approved.what_it_means: A person with an inward-turned thumb may be more introverted or less interested in external relationships and social interactions.

approved.original: यह अंगुली पुरुष की अपेक्षा महिलाओं में कुछ अधिक लम्बी होती है
approved.simple_explanation: In general, women's thumbs are slightly longer than men's.
approved.what_it_means: A longer thumb in women may indicate greater emotional depth, intuition, and nurturing abilities.

approved.original: इसका मुख्य कारण यह है कि बाहरी दुनियां को वे, अधिक संबोधित करती है
approved.simple_explanation: This is because women generally engage more with the external world.
approved.what_it_means: Women with longer thumbs may be more outgoing, communicative, and socially engaged.

approved.original: तर्जनी के छोटी होने पर व्यक्ति को सांसारिक कार्यों के करने में जो अद्भुत है, वह उन्हें अच्छी तरह से सुलझा नहीं सकता
approved.simple_explanation: If the thumb is short, the person may struggle to handle worldly tasks effectively.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a short thumb may face challenges in communication, relationships, and adapting to new situations.

approved.original: समय समय पर एक के बाद दूसरी और अड़चन आ खड़ी होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Obstacles and challenges keep arising at different times.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a short thumb may experience recurring obstacles and difficulties in their life, affecting their relationships and overall well-being.

approved.original: तर्जनी अंगुली का पिचाशय, तिल्ली और कफडों से सम्बन्ध है
approved.simple_explanation: The thumb is associated with the gallbladder, liver, and spleen.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed thumb may indicate good health and functioning of the gallbladder, liver, and spleen.

approved.original: यह अंगुली मध्यमा की तरफ मुड़ी हुई और अंगुली का नख पीला हो तो फेकडों आदि में कहीं कुछ खराबी अवश्य होगी
approved.simple_explanation: If the thumb is bent towards the middle finger and the nail is yellow, there will be some disorder in the spleen and other organs.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a bent thumb and yellow nail may be prone to spleen-related issues and other health problems.

approved.original: अंगुली के साथ शीर्ष रेखा छोटी हो, गुक्र पर्वत उठा हुआ हो तो हर प्रकार से व्यक्ति लापरवाह और असावधान होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Mount of Jupiter is prominent and the Head Line is short, the person is careless and inattentive.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a lack of responsibility and a tendency to be reckless.

approved.original: इन अंगुली की पहली गांठ बड़ी हो तो भाग्य व्यक्ति को सहारा नहीं देता उसकी आर्थिक स्थिति भी कुछ कमजोर होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the First Knot of the Thumb is large, the person's luck does not support them and their financial situation is weak.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests financial struggles and a lack of good fortune.

approved.original: दूसरी गांठ से कठिनाइयों में जूझने वाला होता है यदि कोई भी गांठ न हो तो उच्च विचारों वाला व व्यक्ति प्रतिष्ठित होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If there is a Second Knot of the Thumb, the person struggles with difficulties, but if there is no knot, the person is of high thoughts and respected.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who faces challenges but also has high aspirations and is respected.

approved.original: मध्यमा अंगुली का नाम शनि की अंगुली भी है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The Middle Finger is also called the Saturn Finger.
approved.what_it_means: This is a reference to the Middle Finger's association with Saturn.

approved.original: इसके तीन पोरों पर मकर, कुम्भ और मीन राशियां स्थित होती है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The three joints of the Middle Finger are located on the signs of Capricorn, Aquarius, and Pisces.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a connection to the energies of these zodiac signs.

approved.original: अंगुली के जोड़ पुष्ट व ज्यादा होने से व्यक्ति गणित का अच्छा जानकार होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If the finger joints are prominent and numerous, the person is skilled in mathematics.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a talent for mathematics and problem-solving.

approved.original: मध्यमा का ज्यादा पुष्ट होना और लम्बी होना और इसके साथ ही शनि का पर्वत भी उदा हुआ हो तो व्यक्ति में सहनशीलता विलकुल नहीं होती
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Middle Finger is prominent and long, and the Saturn Mount is also prominent, then the person has no patience.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a lack of patience and tolerance.

approved.original: मध्यमा अंगुली के दैवी रहने से मनुष्य की प्रकृति भयुक्त बनी रहेगी तथा वह हमेशा रोगी रहेगी
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the Middle Finger is divine, the person's nature will be fearful and they will always be sick.
approved.what_it_means: This suggests a person who is prone to fear and illness.

approved.original: यह अंगुली बुध पर्वत की होती है इसका अधिक सम्बन्ध शीर्ष रेखा से है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: This finger is associated with the Mount of Mercury. The Mount of Mercury is related to the head line.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed Mount of Mercury indicates a person with good communication skills and the ability to express themselves effectively.

approved.original: कनिष्ठा और अनामिका यदि बराबर हो तो व्यक्ति अच्छा भाषण देने वाला और अपने विचारों को स्टेज पर भलीभांति व्यक्त करने की क्षमता रखता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the index and middle fingers are equal, the person is good at public speaking and can express their thoughts effectively on stage.
approved.what_it_means: A person with equal index and middle fingers is likely to be a skilled orator and able to convey their thoughts effectively.

approved.original: इसका ऊपरी सिरा अनामिका की पहली रेखा तक जाय तो वह वैज्ञानिक मस्तिष्कवाला होता है और एक अच्छा विद्वान भी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the tip of the index finger reaches the first line of the middle finger, the person has a scientific mind and is a good scholar.
approved.what_it_means: A person with this feature is likely to be intelligent and a good scholar.

approved.original: इसके लम्बी होने से व्यक्ति साधारण स्थिति से ऊपर उठकर अपनी ख्याति स्वयं अर्जित करता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the index finger is long, the person rises above their ordinary situation and earns their own reputation.
approved.what_it_means: A long index finger indicates a person who rises above their ordinary circumstances and earns their own reputation.

approved.original: पौर्वात्य पद्धति में इसके लम्बे होने, पर शुभ माना गया है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: In the ancient method, the long index finger is considered auspicious.
approved.what_it_means: In ancient palmistry, a long index finger is considered a positive sign.

approved.original: कनिष्ठा का नुकीला होना हंसी मजाक पसंद करे चुसे चुटकुले सुनाने का शौक रहे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the index finger is pointed, the person enjoys laughter and has a hobby of telling jokes.
approved.what_it_means: A pointed index finger indicates a person who enjoys humor and may have a talent for telling jokes.

approved.original: कनिष्ठा का पहला पोर समा में चतुराई से भाषण दिलवाता है तथा वह श्रोताओं को मोहित कर सकता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: The first joint of the index finger is skilled in speech and can captivate the audience.
approved.what_it_means: A well-developed first joint of the index finger indicates a person with excellent communication skills and the ability to captivate their audience.

approved.original: अगर पहला पोर लचीला है और शीर्ष रेखा स्पष्ट है और पहली गांठ सुद्ध है तो व्यक्ति व्यापार, उद्योग चलायेगा और उसे कड़ी मेहनत और लगन से सम्पन्न करेगा
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the first joint is flexible, the head line is clear, and the first knot is well, the person will run a business or industry and will complete it with hard work and dedication.
approved.what_it_means: A person with a flexible first joint of the index finger, a clear head line, and a well-developed first knot is likely to be successful in business or industry, requiring hard work and dedication.

approved.original: अंगुली का अग्रभाग चौरस हो और पहला पोर लम्बा होतो वह व्यक्ति तत्व वेता, भाषण द्वारा दूसरो पर प्रभाव डालने वाला तथा अच्छी पोशाक पहनने वाला होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If the thumb is square-shaped and the first phalange is long, the person is knowledgeable, influential, and stylish.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a charismatic individual with a strong presence and a flair for public speaking.

approved.original: तीसरे पोर से पहले पोर तक यदि नुकीली है तो गुप्त विद्या का प्रेमी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the area between the third and first phalanges is sharp, the person is a secret lover of occult knowledge.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a person with a hidden interest in mysticism and the occult.

approved.original: यदि किसी की कनिष्ठा अंगुली अनामिका से लम्बी तथा उसे ज्यादा उध्वं रेखाओं से गुक्त हो तो व्यक्ति को व्यापार में लाभ होगा
approved.simple_explanation: If the little finger is longer than the ring finger and has many horizontal lines, the person will be successful in business.
approved.what_it_means: This indicates a person who will achieve financial success and prosperity in their career.

approved.original: ऐसा व्यक्ति अत्यन्त प्रसिद्ध तथा यशस्वी होता है
approved.simple_explanation: Such a person is extremely famous and successful.
approved.what_it_means: This reveals a highly accomplished and renowned individual.

approved.original: तर्जनी, मध्यमा, अनामिका एवं कनिष्ठा के नाम तर्जनी- प्रदेशिनी, तर्जनी, शत्रुहा, आद्या, गवेषिणी आदि
approved.simple_explanation: The names of the fingers are: Thumb - Pradeshi, Index - Raja, Middle - Guru, Ring - Bhakta, Little - Gaveshini.
approved.what_it_means: This lists the names of the fingers and their associated qualities.

approved.original: मध्यमा- ज्येष्ठा, मध्यमा, लक्ष्मी, सौभाग्यवती
approved.simple_explanation: Middle finger - Elder, Middle, Lakshmi, Soubhagya.
approved.what_it_means: This lists the qualities associated with the middle finger.

approved.original: कनिष्ठा- कनिष्ठा, अन्या, लघुतारा तथा कांचनी
approved.simple_explanation: Little finger - Little, Other, Small, Golden.
approved.what_it_means: This lists the qualities associated with the little finger.

approved.original: अङ्गुलियों के नाम अङ्गुलियों के वर्ण (रंग) अङ्गुलियों का वर्ण ज्ञान अङ्गुलियों में भन्ध अङ्गुलियों के बीच का छिद्द तर्जनीमध्यमार्धे मध्यमानामिकान्तरे
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: Names of fingers, Colors of fingers, Knowledge of fingers, Lines on fingers, Gaps between fingers.
approved.what_it_means: This lists the various aspects of the fingers and their associated qualities.

approved.original: यदि अंगुले की तुलना में अंगुलियां अधिक छोटी या बडी हों तो वह व्यक्ति अल्पायु तथा धन-धान्य से रहित होता है
approved.simple_explanation: If the fingers are significantly shorter or longer than the palm, the person may have a short life and lack wealth.
approved.what_it_means: This feature indicates a person's potential for a short life and limited material success.

approved.original: मध्यमायां तु दीर्घायां भार्याःनिर्दिशेत्
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the middle finger is long, it indicates a long marriage.
approved.what_it_means: A long middle finger suggests a long and fulfilling marriage.

approved.original: अनामिकायां दीर्घायां विद्यागोगी भवेन्नरः
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the index finger is long, the person will be learned and wise.
approved.what_it_means: A long index finger indicates a person with great knowledge and wisdom.

approved.original: यदि मध्यमा असामान्य रूप से बडी हो तो ऐसे व्यक्ति को स्त्री का सुख प्रायः नहीं मिलता है
approved.simple_explanation: Translation: If the middle finger is unusually large, the person usually does not get the happiness of a woman.
approved.what_it_means: An unusually large middle finger suggests difficulties in relationships with women.
